metadata.description: Claude Code skills for building React + Next.js apps with hybrid Clean Architecture, Mantine UI, and TanStack Query.

plugins.name: architector
plugins.description: Design and implement features using hybrid Clean Architecture. Domain → Use-Cases → Adapters → UI with Valibot schemas and TanStack Query.

plugins.name: component-creator
plugins.description: Create React components with Smart/Dumb separation via composeHooks, translations, and a standard file layout (index.tsx, lib.ts, interfaces.ts, messages.json, styles.module.css). UI-library agnostic.
